working_on.task: Fix podcast feed 404/403 on Cloudflare Workers
working_on.notes: Fix 2 issues: (1) 404 trailing slash - worker.js intercepts /feed/podcast/ and serves static file with correct headers. (2) 403 from RSS validators - user created WAF rule on Cloudflare Dashboard to skip bot protection for /feed/ paths.

recent_changes.description: Fixed podcast feed 404 on Cloudflare (trailing slash) + 403 from RSS validators (Bot Fight Mode). Created worker.js with CORS/HEAD/OPTIONS support. User created WAF rule on CF Dashboard.
Migrated podcast RSS feed from WordPress to Astro. 34 episodes, audio on R2 CDN.
Batch 5: Added 4 more service pages (Chuyển đổi, BHXH, HKD, KT thuế HKD)

errors_encountered.error: Podcast feed 404 on Cloudflare with trailing slash
errors_encountered.solution: Astro builds API endpoints as extensionless files (dist/feed/podcast). Cloudflare doesn't auto-resolve trailing slash. Created worker.js with run_worker_first in wrangler.jsonc to intercept and serve with correct headers.

errors_encountered.error: Podcast feed 403 from RSS validators (rssvalidator.app, podba.se, podcastai.com)
errors_encountered.solution: Cloudflare Bot Fight Mode blocking validator bots. Created WAF Custom Rule on Cloudflare Dashboard: URI Path contains /feed/ → Skip all remaining rules.

errors_encountered.error: wrangler deploy failed: Invalid compatibility date 2026-04-9
errors_encountered.solution: Must use ISO 8601 format with zero-padded day: 2026-04-09

decisions_made.decision: Menu Dịch Vụ cố định 8 submenu, batch 3-4 KHÔNG thêm vào menu
Dùng worker.js nhỏ thay vì @astrojs/cloudflare adapter
decisions_made.reason: Đơn giản, không cài thêm package, chỉ xử lý /feed/podcast/ trailing slash + CORS/HEAD

decisions_made.decision: WAF Custom Rule trên CF Dashboard cho phép bot truy cập /feed/
decisions_made.reason: Bot Fight Mode chặn RSS validators gây 403
